ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pure_liquids" (
  "liquid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pure liquid */,
  "liquid_name" TEXT /* Name of the pure liquid */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the pure liquid */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the pure liquid */,
  "state_of_matter" TEXT /* State of the pure liquid (e.g., liquid, gas, solid) */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the pure liquid in degrees Celsius */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the pure liquid in degrees Celsius */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the pure liquid at a reference temperature in kg/m^3 */,
  "reference_temperature" REAL /* Reference temperature for the density in degrees Celsius */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the pure liquid (e.g., a string representation or a file path to a structure image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("liquid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermodynamic_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermodynamic property */,
  "liquid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pure liquid the property belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in bars */,
  "enthalpy_vaporization" REAL /* Enthalpy of vaporization in J/mol */,
  "entropy_vaporization" REAL /* Entropy of vaporization in J/mol*K */,
  "vapor_pressure" REAL /* Vapor pressure in Pa */,
  "specific_heat" REAL /* Specific heat capacity in J/kg*K */,
  "thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Thermal conductivity in W/m*K */,
  "viscosity" REAL /* Viscosity in Pa*s */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the thermodynamic data (e.g., experimental, theoretical, literature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermodynamic_properties_liquid_id FOREIGN KEY ("liquid_id") REFERENCES pure_liquids ("liquid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coefficients" (
  "coefficient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coefficient */,
  "liquid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pure liquid the coefficient belongs to */,
  "temperature_coefficient" REAL /* Temperature coefficient */,
  "pressure_coefficient" REAL /* Pressure coefficient */,
  "specific_heat_coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient for specific heat capacity */,
  "thermal_conductivity_coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient for thermal conductivity */,
  "viscosity_coefficient" REAL /* Coefficient for viscosity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coefficient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coefficients_liquid_id FOREIGN KEY ("liquid_id") REFERENCES pure_liquids ("liquid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental data point */,
  "liquid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pure liquid the data belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in bars */,
  "experimental_enthalpy_vaporization" REAL /* Experimental enthalpy of vaporization in J/mol */,
  "experimental_entropy_vaporization" REAL /* Experimental entropy of vaporization in J/mol*K */,
  "experimental_vapor_pressure" REAL /* Experimental vapor pressure in Pa */,
  "experimental_specific_heat" REAL /* Experimental specific heat capacity in J/kg*K */,
  "experimental_thermal_conductivity" REAL /* Experimental thermal conductivity in W/m*K */,
  "experimental_viscosity" REAL /* Experimental viscosity in Pa*s */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the experimental data (e.g., journal, lab report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_liquid_id FOREIGN KEY ("liquid_id") REFERENCES pure_liquids ("liquid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the thermodynamic property */,
  "liquid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pure liquid being accessed */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in bars */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the thermodynamic property was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_liquid_id FOREIGN KEY ("liquid_id") REFERENCES pure_liquids ("liquid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., J/mol, Pa, K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)
